title: registry.json product mcp block
description: The optional per-product "mcp" block in registry.json (INTERFACE.md §4.1). A map of MCP server name to stdio launch spec. All registry consumers MUST tolerate its presence (and that of any other unknown field); scripts that do not implement MCP wiring silently ignore it and keep surfacing install.mcpInstructions prose. Wire-time expansion: a leading ~/ or ~\ in command and every env value is expanded to the user home; no other token expansion (${...} passes through untouched).

command.description: Bare executable name (PATH-resolved by the CLI host) or a path; leading ~ expanded at wire time.

env.description: Environment for the server process; leading ~ in values expanded at wire time.
